retry_reason: Not a wrapper — the refcount operations are incidental to the primary I/O completion logic.

judge.reason: The function's primary purpose is to handle the end of a RAID56 I/O operation, including bio completion logic (checking reads, calling end_io callbacks) and only incidentally decrements a bio counter and puts the bioc. Refcount management is not the main focus.
